text_block_list.text: After a day out...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna head back now.
choice_data_list: Already?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? There something you wanted<n>to do?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That's not it, but I'm taken aback by<n>her coldness
toward me despite<n>having spent the whole day
together.
choice_data_list: Did you not have a good time today?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? It was fine.
choice_data_list: I wanted you to have fun...

text_block_list.text: Ugh, ease off already. That's for me<n>to decide.

Whether or not I have fun is none of<n>your
business.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We done? I wanna go home already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
A new weapon comes out today. I<n>gotta check it
out ASAP.

It's true that I can't force her to have<n>fun, but I
really want her to feel glad<n>that she came out
today.
choice_data_list: Then I'll just bring the fun to you!
Then I'll just bring the fun to you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I have absolutely no idea what<n>you're
talking about.
choice_data_list: I want to see you smile.
I want to see you smile.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.
You're an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I expect her to leave after insulting<n>me, but she
doesn't. It seems like<n>she's waiting for my next
move.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since she likes gaming, maybe I<n>should suggest
some kind of game<n>we can play. That would
surely keep<n>her entertained!
choice_data_list: Let's play the rhyme game!
Let's play tag!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What am I, a child? No way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why did I even stay? I should've<n>just left...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was a total flop. She looks<n>beyond
unimpressed, but I can't let<n>this chance slip away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Rhyme!
Time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously playing by<n>yourself? Do you
have any shame at<n>all?
choice_data_list: Shame, shame... Fame!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Siiigh...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I struggle to keep the game going by<n>myself while
she pointedly ignores<n>me.
choice_data_list: Mustard!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously, will you knock it off<n>already?

Welcome! We've got some freshly<n>baked
pastries and desserts of all<n>kinds! Come and take
a look! ♪
Oh, they even have custard...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ack! N-no, I didn't mean to say that!
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't playing your stupid game! I<n>was just
looking at the custard<n>pastry!
choice_data_list:
Ohhh! I said "mustard" and you followed up with
"custard"!

text_block_list.text: Wait, are you telling me you didn't<n>even notice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Arrgh! Me and my big mouth!
choice_data_list: So you do want to play!
So you do want to play!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't, and I wasn't playing withyou! Ugh, wipe that dumb smile offyour face!
Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You really think you're a match for<n>me?
choice_data_list: I might be able to catch you if I try really hard?
I might be able to catch you if I try really hard?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why would you suggest a battle you<n>can't win?
You could've said literally<n>any other game.
choice_data_list: I wanted to play something you would enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You make it sound like I'm some<n>hyperactive kid...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. You asked for it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, see ya.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whoa! I have to catch up!

Unfortunately for me, Umamusume<n>are fast even
when they're not<n>trying. No matter how hard I run,
there's no way I can catch her...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Still no sign of my dumb trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Psh... There's no way a regular<n>person could
stand a chance against<n>me. How'd I get stuck
with the<n>world's stupidest trainer?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And what was that whole thing about<n>wanting to
see me smile? What a<n>weirdo.

I probably should have waited instead<n>of sprinting
off so fast...
What am I even saying? This is<n>ridiculous.
